stimulus: Joy Harjo is the first Native American to be named poet laureate of the United States. Her collection An American Sunrise—an interweaving of memoir and history, lyric verse and ______blank stands as a testament to her range as a writer of the Mvskoke Nation.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice A is the best answer. “An interweaving of memoir and history, lyric verse and song” is a nonessential supplement, so it must be set off with a matched pair of punctuation marks. A dash already opens the supplement, so a dash is needed at its end to match.

Choice B is incorrect because a semicolon can’t pair with an opening dash to set off a supplement. Choice C is incorrect because a comma can’t pair with an opening dash. Choice D is incorrect because it fails to close the supplement opened earlier in the sentence.
